content: (The location is now Solitude.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Bliss, Solitude Guard, Frea, Cassie, Serana) (Cassie hit MJR with Ebony Sword)
Lydia: By Dibella's grace, get away from my Thane, you wench! I'll cleave you in two!
Imperial Soldier: Stand down, all of you! No brawling in Solitude this early morn!

Lydia: Stay out of this, Imperial dog! This bandit's after my Thane—I'll end her now in Dibella's name! Imperial Soldier: I said stand down, housecarl! Jarl Elisif won't have her city turned into a battlefield over some tavern scrap!

Lydia: My Thane's safety comes first, you Imperial lapdog! This slut struck him—feel the bite of my Ebony steel for Solitude's sake! Imperial Soldier: Enough! Guards, seize that housecarl before she turns this tavern into a bloodbath under the morning sky!

Lydia: That frostbow bitch Aline and her crossbow cronies won't touch my Thane again—by Dibella's curves, I'll smash their skulls in this Solitude shithole before dawn breaks fully! Imperial Soldier: The hells have broken loose in here with all this clanging steel and bolts flying! Lay off the fight, warrior—Jarl's orders demand peace in her halls, or it'll be chains for all of ya under this clear morning sky!

(*You are observing the following:* In the scene, a dimly lit stone chamber unfolds before you, with rough-hewn walls of gray rock adorned by flickering torchlight casting long shadows. Cobwebs drape from the ceiling, and a heavy wooden door stands slightly ajar at the far end, revealing a glimpse of an outdoor courtyard paved with cracked stone slabs under a twilight sky. Scattered on the floor are remnants of ancient debris—shards of pottery, a rusted iron chain, and a small wooden crate overturned near a corner. To the right, a narrow alcove holds a simple stone altar with faded runes etched into its surface, beside which lies a coiled rope and a leather-bound book. In the foreground, your view centers on a sturdy wooden table cluttered with alchemical vials, a half-eaten loaf of bread, and a gleaming metal crossbow propped against its edge, its string taut and bolt chambered. Overlaid across the vista are translucent command lines and status notifications in a crisp, glowing font: messages about loading a rugged warrior figure, flushing combat states with a companion named Cass, and tallying events in a log that reads "Added 15 events, max total in 5.) (Lydia is no longer in combat.) (Imperial Soldier is now in combat!) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Solitude Guard, Frea, Serana, Bliss, Solitude Guard) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak bikini D) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak bikini D) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak Officer bikini G) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak Officer bikini G) (MJR picked up / took Steel Bolt) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak bikini K) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak Officer Thong B) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak Officer Boots Long A) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak Pauldrons A) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak Officer Boots Long A) (Imperial Soldier equipped Imperial Sword) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak bikini K) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Imperial Sword) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak Pauldrons A) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Stormcloak Thong D) (Imperial Soldier has entered combat with Ivana) (Imperial Soldier equipped Stormcloak Thong D) (Imperial Soldier equipped Steel Arrow) (Imperial Soldier dropped/gave Calyps Strapon) (Imperial Soldier equipped Imperial Bow) (Imperial Soldier has entered combat with Aline) (Ivana was killed by the group) (Imperial Soldier is no longer in combat) (Imperial Soldier has entered combat with Bliss) (Imperial Soldier unequipped Imperial Bow) (Bliss hit Imperial Soldier with Blade of Woe)
